meta.title: OnSite Club — Gear, Technology, Knowledge
meta.description: Three rooms. One club. Everything a construction professional needs.

opening.subtitle: Gear, tools, and a crew for the people who actually build this country.

floorplan.label: Explore the Blueprint
floorplan.room_gear_desc: Tees, hoodies, caps, and stickers. Phrases only trade workers understand. Wear the build.
floorplan.room_tech_desc: Jobsite apps for workers. Custom software for companies. If we built it for us, we can build it for you.
floorplan.room_learn_desc: Ontario certifications, trade career paths, safety guides, and courses. Know the trade.

carousel.label: What's Inside
carousel.calc_desc: Add, split and convert measurements by voice. Built for framers.
carousel.time_desc: GPS geofence clock-in. Auto PDF reports every week.
carousel.tees_desc: Eat. Sheet. Repeat. — and 12 more designs only builders get.
carousel.hoodies_desc: Heavyweight. Bold logos. Built for Canadian winters.
carousel.custom_desc: We built our own tools. Let us build yours. Apps for construction companies.
carousel.certs_desc: Mandatory safety courses and trade requirements. Start your career right.
carousel.caps_desc: Embroidered OnSite logo. Snapback and fitted styles.
carousel.stickers_desc: Slap 'em on your hard hat, toolbox, truck. Rep the club everywhere.
carousel.check_desc: AI-suggested steps and materials for every job type.

manifesto.text_1: This city didn't build itself. Somebody woke up before the sun, scraped ice, put on boots that already hurt, and made
manifesto.text_2: . We exist because that somebody deserves more than a paycheck — they deserve
manifesto.text_strong_2: a name on what they built
manifesto.sign: Founded by a carpenter · Built in Canada
